title: Will Somebody be the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts this week?
subtitle: Somebody:: Latto
rules_primary: If Somebody is the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts for May 31, 2025 then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Billboard Hot 100 measures music consumption from a Friday to Thursday. This is released as the chart for the Saturday following Thursday (in this case, May 31, 2025).

Clarification 7/18/23: In the past, this market has used <date> to refer to the date at the end of the tracking week (the week in which Billboard records music consumption to be eligible for the Hot 100), a Thursday. In the future, the <date> in the Rulebook and the date listed in the short market rules on the market page will refer to the date that a given Billboard chart is dated for, as the Instructions in the market rules model. This is the second Saturday following the end of the tracking week. For example, today's new market will cover music consumption ending Thursday, July 20. The chart will be released on Tuesday, July 25. it will have a <date> corresponding to Saturday, July 29, 2023.

title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be >78° on May 17, 2025?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Denver, CO for May 17, 2025 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is greater than 78°, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all weather data is the same. While checking a source like AccuWeather or Google Weather may help guide your decision, the official and final value used to determine this market is the highest temperature as reported by the corresponding NWS Climatological Report (Daily) linked in the rules above. Preliminary NWS reporting and measurement methods may be subject to underlying rounding and conversion nuances. Traders should exercise caution when interpreting preliminary NWS data.

rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices.

title: Will the yield of 10-year U.S. treasury notes be above 4.65 on May 23, 2025?
subtitle: 4.66% or above
rules_primary: If the yield curve par rate for 10-year U.S. treasury notes is above 4.65 % on May 23, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The market will expire at the sooner of the first 7:00 PM ET following the data release for May 23, 2025, or one week following May 23, 2025.

rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' Ethereum Real-Time Index (ERTI) before 5 PM EDT is above 2189.99 at 5 PM EDT on May 17, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices.

title: Will it **rain** in New York City on Saturday?
rules_primary: If the number of inches of precipitation recorded at Central Park, New York on May 17, 2025 is strictly greater than 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion only encompasses Expiration Values that are strictly greater than  inches. If the Expiration Value is T (when the target is 0) for Trace or R for Record (where the record set is strictly greater than ), then the market resolves to Yes.

This market will close and expire the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of data for May 17, 2025 or May 24, 2025.

If the Climatological Report is still inconclusive on May 24, 2025, Kalshi will reference the columns titled "Weather" and "1 Hour Precip (in)" in the NWS time series (https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=knyc) for determination via rule 7.2 of the rulebook.

title: What will the U.S. tariff rate on China be on Jun 30, 2025?
rules_primary: If the US tariff rate on China is 60 to 79.99%  on Jun 30, 2025 at 10:00 AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This includes both general import tariffs on all imports into the United States as well as any other general import tariffs on <country>. Only tariffs which are in effect will qualify. Tariffs which are paused, or which have been announced but not yet gone into effect will not be considered. All percentages will be rounded to two decimal places using standard rounding. Example: 21.235% rounds to 21.24%.

title: Will the **high temp in Miami** be >91° on May 16, 2025?
subtitle: 92° or above
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded at Miami International Airport for May 16, 2025 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is greater than 91°, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all weather data is the same. rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' Ethereum Real-Time Index (ERTI) before 10 PM EDT is between 2070-2089.99 at 10 PM EDT on May 16, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices.

title: Will it **rain** in New York City on Friday?
rules_primary: If the number of inches of precipitation recorded at Central Park, New York on May 16, 2025 is strictly greater than 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion only encompasses Expiration Values that are strictly greater than  inches. If the Expiration Value is T (when the target is 0) for Trace or R for Record (where the record set is strictly greater than ), then the market resolves to Yes.

This market will close and expire the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of data for May 16, 2025 or May 23, 2025.

If the Climatological Report is still inconclusive on May 23, 2025, Kalshi will reference the columns titled "Weather" and "1 Hour Precip (in)" in the NWS time series (https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=knyc) for determination via rule 7.2 of the rulebook.

title: Will core inflation rise more than 0.6% in June?
rules_primary: If the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items less Food and Energy for June 2025, as published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, increases by more than 0.6%, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
Please note that the value of the Underlying is the single-decimal value reported by the BLS.

In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: Will Trump meet with Xi Jinping before 2025?

title: Will CPI rise more than 0.6% in June 2025?
rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 0.6% in June 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The market will expire at the sooner of the first 10:00 AM following the release of the data, or one week following the scheduled release of the data (scheduled for July 15, 2025). The market will always close on 8:25 AM on the scheduled day of the data release (July 15, 2025). Please note: the Expiration Value is the single-decimal value published at the Source Agency. In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: Will Powell say Egg at his Jun 2025 press conference?
rules_primary: If the Chair of the Federal Reserve says Egg at his Jun 2025 post-FOMC meeting introductory remarks and Q+A, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The transcript provided by the Fed will be used to resolve this market. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Hyphenated or compound words used with Egg will not be included. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. A compound word group separated by spaces (e.g., "fire truck") will trigger the Payout Criterion if it includes, but a singular compound word (e.g., "fireman"), or a hyphenated compound word (e.g., "fire-resistant") will not. If a phrase can act as both a singular compound word or a compound word group, (e.g., "fire truck" or "firetruck") and there is no Source Agency transcript, Kalshi will determine and defer to the most commonly accepted spelling.

title: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 2.1% for the year ending in May 2025?
rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 2.1% in the twelve months ending May 2025 (as represented by the one-decimal place value reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics), then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the
government shutdown

title: Will Pink Pony Club be the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts this week?
subtitle: Pink Pony Club:: Chappell Roan
rules_primary: If Pink Pony Club is the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts for May 31, 2025 then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Billboard Hot 100 measures music consumption from a Friday to Thursday. This is released as the chart for the Saturday following Thursday (in this case, May 31, 2025).

Clarification 7/18/23: In the past, this market has used <date> to refer to the date at the end of the tracking week (the week in which Billboard records music consumption to be eligible for the Hot 100), a Thursday. In the future, the <date> in the Rulebook and the date listed in the short market rules on the market page will refer to the date that a given Billboard chart is dated for, as the Instructions in the market rules model. This is the second Saturday following the end of the tracking week. For example, today's new market will cover music consumption ending Thursday, July 20. The chart will be released on Tuesday, July 25. it will have a <date> corresponding to Saturday, July 29, 2023.

title: Will Superman be the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts this week?
subtitle: Superman:: Morgan Wallen
rules_primary: If Superman is the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts for May 24, 2025 then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Billboard Hot 100 measures music consumption from a Friday to Thursday. This is released as the chart for the Saturday following Thursday (in this case, May 24, 2025).

Clarification 7/18/23: In the past, this market has used <date> to refer to the date at the end of the tracking week (the week in which Billboard records music consumption to be eligible for the Hot 100), a Thursday. In the future, the <date> in the Rulebook and the date listed in the short market rules on the market page will refer to the date that a given Billboard chart is dated for, as the Instructions in the market rules model. This is the second Saturday following the end of the tracking week. For example, today's new market will cover music consumption ending Thursday, July 20. The chart will be released on Tuesday, July 25. it will have a <date> corresponding to Saturday, July 29, 2023.

title: Will S.1582 - GENIUS Act passes the senate before Jul 1, 2025?
rules_primary: If S.1582 - GENIUS Act passes the senate before Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This Act aims to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for payment stablecoins in the United States, establishing clear rules for issuers regarding reserves, consumer protection, and supervision by federal and state regulators.

title: Superman streams on Jun 20, 2025?
rules_primary: If Superman has above 30 million total streams on Spotify on Jun 20, 2025 at 10 AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Total stream count will be determined using the Spotify desktop app at 10 AM ET, based on the exact number displayed at that time. Any updates or changes after 10 AM ET will NOT be considered. The song will be verified using the following album link: https://open.spotify.com/track/1KMKBWBQEB0wdGlV7WR6JV?si=2f117df7b6924fa9

title: Will H.R.276 - Gulf of America Act passes the senate before Jun 1, 2025?
rules_primary: If H.R.276 - Gulf of America Act passes the senate before Jun 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This bill renames the Gulf of Mexico as the Gulf of America and directs federal agencies to update their documents and maps to incorporate the new name.

title: What will the U.S. tariff rate on China be on May 31, 2025?
rules_primary: If the US tariff rate on China is 75.00% to 99.99% on May 31, 2025 at 10:00 AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This includes both general import tariffs on all imports into the United States as well as any other general import tariffs on <country>. Only tariffs which are in effect will qualify. Tariffs which are paused, or which have been announced but not yet gone into effect will not be considered. All percentages will be rounded to two decimal places using standard rounding. Example: 21.235% rounds to 21.24%.

title: Will Lose Control be the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts this week?
subtitle: Lose Control:: Teddy Swims
rules_primary: If Lose Control is the #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 charts for May 24, 2025 then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The Billboard Hot 100 measures music consumption from a Friday to Thursday. This is released as the chart for the Saturday following Thursday (in this case, May 24, 2025).

Clarification 7/18/23: In the past, this market has used <date> to refer to the date at the end of the tracking week (the week in which Billboard records music consumption to be eligible for the Hot 100), a Thursday. In the future, the <date> in the Rulebook and the date listed in the short market rules on the market page will refer to the date that a given Billboard chart is dated for, as the Instructions in the market rules model. This is the second Saturday following the end of the tracking week. For example, today's new market will cover music consumption ending Thursday, July 20. The chart will be released on Tuesday, July 25. it will have a <date> corresponding to Saturday, July 29, 2023.

title: Will CPI rise more than 0.5% in May 2025?
rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 0.5% in May 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The market will expire at the sooner of the first 10:00 AM following the release of the data, or one week following the scheduled release of the data (scheduled for June 11, 2025). The market will always close on 8:25 AM on the scheduled day of the data release (June 11, 2025). Please note: the Expiration Value is the single-decimal value published at the Source Agency. In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 2.3% for the year ending in May 2025?
rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 2.3% in the twelve months ending May 2025 (as represented by the one-decimal place value reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics), then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the
government shutdown

title: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 2.2% for the year ending in May 2025?
rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 2.2% in the twelve months ending May 2025 (as represented by the one-decimal place value reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics), then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the
government shutdown

title: Will CPI rise more than 0.4% in May 2025?
rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 0.4% in May 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The market will expire at the sooner of the first 10:00 AM following the release of the data, or one week following the scheduled release of the data (scheduled for June 11, 2025). The market will always close on 8:25 AM on the scheduled day of the data release (June 11, 2025). Please note: the Expiration Value is the single-decimal value published at the Source Agency. In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: Will SpaceX launch another Starship by May 21, 2025?
subtitle: By May 21, 2025
rules_primary: If SpaceX launches the Starship again by May 21, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will there be more than 500 tornadoes in May?
rules_primary: If the preliminary number of tornadoes in May is above 500 , then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The number of tornadoes will be determined by the "Storm Reports Legend" shown in the bottom left corner of the "Preliminary Report Summary."

title: Will the unemployment rate (U-3) be above 4.5% in May?

rules_secondary: In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: Will Trump make 8 trips to Mar-a-Lago as President in May 2025?
rules_primary: If Trump makes exactly 8 trips to Mar-a-Lago in May 2025 as President, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: A single visit begins when the President arrives in Mar-a-Lago and ends when the President has returned to the White House. A visit need not end to be included – i.e. if May 2025 ends with the President still there, that visit counts for the purposes of the count. If the President is in Mar-a-Lago at the beginning of May 2025, that will count as a visit.

title: Will Elon Musk leave the DOGE before Jun 16, 2025?
rules_primary: If Elon Musk has left the Department of Government Efficiency before Jun 16, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
If Elon Musk continues to work for the Department of Government Efficiency on Jun 16, 2025 this respective market will resolve No. It is our determination that the payout criterion for this market has not been met. As a result, all markets within the event will remain open until the payout criterion has been met or the expiration date passes.

The rules state that "If DOGE is renamed, restructured, or absorbed into another entity, then that does not trigger the Payout Criterion. Musk leaving his role for a successor role in a changed or absorbed version of DOGE would not be encompassed within the Payout Criterion."

Elon Musk led DOGE until Jan 20, 2025, when DOGE became a government agency as the result of an executive order. When DOGE became a government agency it was not clear what Elon Musk's role was at DOGE. Since then, the New York Times has reported that Elon Musk has left his role as a leader of DOGE for a successor role in a changed or absorbed version of DOGE.

The New York Times wrote on Feb 25th, "Amy Gleason, a former health care investment executive, is serving as the acting administrator of the Department of Government Efficiency, the government-overhaul task force imposing dramatic changes across the federal bureaucracy under the direction of Elon Musk, a White House official said on Tuesday." 

The following change in role is not encompassed within the Payout Criterion because Elon Musk has left his role as a leader of DOGE for a successor role in a changed or absorbed version of DOGE.

If Mr. Musk leaves this role for one that is not related to DOGE,  the market will then resolve to Yes. If Elon Musk stays in this role or leaves his current role for a different role within DOGE and stays in that one through the expiration date for a given market, the market will resolve to No on its expiration date.

rules_primary: If xAI has the top-ranked LLM on May 31, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: If two models are tied under Rank (UB), then the model with the highest Arena Score will win. If two models are still tied after that, then the model with the most votes will win. If two models are still tied after that, the model that was released earlier will win.

title: Will the FBI announce a partnership with the UFC to train its agents before Jul 2025?
rules_primary: If the Federal Bureau of Investigation (“FBI”) has announced (or it is otherwise reported that they have) an agreement with Ultimate Fighting Championship for the purposes at least of training FBI agents before Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will Canada block Pornhub before Jun 2025?
rules_primary: If Canada blocks access to Pornhub from within the United States before Jun 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will tariffs on alcohol come into effect before Jun 2025?
rules_primary: If the President imposes any new (or raised) tariffs before Jun 1, 2025 on European Union alcohol, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will a bill that regulates digital assets pegged to fiat currency  (including their issuance, reserve requirements, licensing, custodial protections, or regulatory authority) becomes law before Jun 1, 2025?
rules_primary: If a bill that regulates digital assets pegged to fiat currency  (including their issuance, reserve requirements, licensing, custodial protections, or regulatory authority) becomes law before Jun 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: What will NVIDIA Corporation say on their next earnings call?
rules_primary: If Quantum is said by any NVIDIA Corporation representative during the earnings call (including the Q+A) for next, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: Audio of the earnings call will be used to resolve the market. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Hyphenated or compound words used with Quantum will not be included. Hyphenated‬‭ or‬‭ compound‬‭ words‬‭ used‬‭ with‬‭ <word>‬‭ will‬‭ not‬‭ be‬‭ included.‬‭ A‬‭ compound‬‭ word‬ group‬‭ separated‬‭ by‬‭ spaces‬‭ (e.g.,‬‭ "fire‬‭ truck")‬‭ will‬‭ trigger‬‭ the‬‭ Payout‬‭ Criterion‬‭ if‬‭ it‬‭ includes‬‭ <word>,‬‭ but‬‭ a‬‭ singular‬‭ compound‬‭ word‬‭ (e.g.,‬‭ "fireman"),‬‭ or‬‭ a‬‭ hyphenated‬‭ compound‬‭ word‬‭ (e.g.,‬‭ "fire-resistant")‬‭ will‬‭ not.‬‭ If‬‭ a‬‭ phrase‬‭ can‬‭ act‬‭ as‬‭ both‬‭ a‬‭ singular‬‭ compound‬‭ word‬‭ or‬‭ a‬‭ compound‬ word‬‭ group,‬‭ (e.g.,‬‭ "fire‬‭ truck"‬‭ or‬‭ "firetruck")‬‭ and‬‭ there‬‭ is‬‭ no‬‭ Source‬‭ Agency‬‭ transcript,‬‭ Kalshi‬ will determine and defer to the most commonly accepted spelling.

title: Will core inflation rise more than 0.3% in June?
rules_primary: If the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items less Food and Energy for June 2025, as published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, increases by more than 0.3%, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
Please note that the value of the Underlying is the single-decimal value reported by the BLS.

In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.

title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by >25bps at their June 2025 meeting?
subtitle: Hike >25bps
rules_primary: If the Federal Reserve does a Hike of >25bps on June 18, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This market is mutually exclusive. Therefore, if the Federal Reserve hikes by 50bps, the 50bp market will resolve to Yes and the 25bp market will resolve to No. Only one bucket, at maximum, can resolve to Yes.Clarification 10:10 AM ET 8/5/24: If a scheduled FOMC meeting is canceled and does not occur on its scheduled date, then all strikes in this market resolve to No.

title: Will any member of Trump's Cabinet leave before Jul 2025?
rules_primary: If any member of Trump's Cabinet leaves their office, or announces they will leave their office, from Feb 28, 2025 to Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary:
The member must have been confirmed or appointed to their position after the President to be inaugurated on January 20, 2025 has taken office.

For purposes of this Contract, the Cabinet includes the heads of the 15 government agencies in the Cabinet as of Issuance, as well the Administrator of the EPA, the President’s Chief of Staff, Director of National Intelligence, Director of OMB, Director of CIA, United States Trade Representative, Ambassador to the UN, Chair of the Council of Economic Advisers, Administrator of the SBA, and Director of OSTP. Acting roles are not included. Leaving office as a result of death is not encompassed by the Payout Criterion.

rules_secondary: Days will be counted by checking the source agency at 10:00 AM ET. PLEASE NOTE: If there are multiple government shutdowns during the relevant period, this market only applies to the first shutdown, as the market will resolve after the end of the first shutdown.

title: Will there be a successful vote no confidence in France before Jul 1, 2025?
rules_primary: If there is a successful vote of no confidence in the French parliament before Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will Elon Musk settle his lawsuit with OpenAI before Jul 2025?
rules_primary: If Elon Musk settles any of his claims in his lawsuit with OpenAI/Sam Altman before Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.

title: Will Syria hold national elections before Jul 2025?
rules_primary: If Syria holds elections for national office before Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The election need not be deemed "free" or "fair", but it must have at least two options for candidates/parties and be broadly open to the populace, even if some ethnic/religious groups are excluded.

title: Will Trump use recess appointments to fill any Cabinet position before Jul 1, 2025?
rules_primary: If President Trump uses the recess power to appoint any member of the Cabinet before Jul 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The Cabinet positions included are Secretaries of Agriculture, Commerce, Defense, Education, Energy, Health and Human Services, Homeland Security, Housing and Urban Development, Interior, Labor, State, Transportation, Treasury, and Veterans Affairs, and the Attorney General. Even if that recess appointment is later ruled illegal and vacated, an announcement by the President that the recess appointment is taking place is sufficient to resolve the market to Yes.

title: When will Dogecoin hit $1?
rules_primary: If the price of Dogecoin is above 0.99999999 before Jun 1, 2025, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: The Contract is settled by taking an average of CF Benchmarks' Dogecoin Real-Time Index (DOGEUSD_RTI) in any sixty second period starting November 21, 2024, and ending Jun 1, 2025. Prices from outside traditional market hours (e.g. nights and weekends) do count towards the Contract's expiration.

title: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 5.25% following the Fed's Jun 18, 2025 meeting?
rules_primary: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 5.25% following the Federal Reserve's Jun 18, 2025 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
rules_secondary: This market will expire the first 2:05 PM ET following the release of a Federal Reserve statement for their Jun 18, 2025 meeting or one week following the last day of that meeting.
